sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Galapagos Adds Industry Veteran Paulo Fontoura to Board as Independent Director
feed.summary: Galapagos has appointed Dr. Paulo Fontoura as a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective February 9, 2026, succeeding Dr. Susanne Schaffert. Dr. Fontoura brings extensive pharmaceutical leadership experience from Roche, and his appointment is expected to bolster Galapagos' strategic oversight as it advances innovative medicines and business development. Analysts currently rate GLPG stock as a Sell with a $22.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, assigns a Neutral rating due to challenging financial and operational landscapes despite a strong cash position.

feed.title: Dropbox Inc. (NASDAQ:DBX) Reports Narrow Q4 Beat Amid Investor Growth Concerns
feed.summary: Dropbox (NASDAQ:DBX) reported a narrow Q4 2025 beat on revenue and non-GAAP EPS, slightly exceeding analyst expectations. Despite positive financial performance including strong cash generation and share repurchases, the stock declined in after-hours trading due to investor concerns about slow revenue growth and the lack of immediate forward-looking guidance. The company is focusing on evolving its core business and accelerating the development of its AI-powered Dash product to drive future growth.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Jennifer Weber Sells 25,000 Shares of Archer-Danie
feed.summary: Jennifer Weber, Senior Vice President at Archer-Daniels-Midland Co (ADM), sold 25,000 shares of the company on February 17, 2026, reducing her holdings to 123,668 shares. The transaction occurred when ADM shares were trading at $67.04, indicating the stock is modestly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.13, and a P/E ratio of 31.02 which is higher than the industry median.

feed.title: Bitcoin Depot Stock to Reverse Split on Monday, February 23rd (NASDAQ:BTM)
feed.summary: Bitcoin Depot (NASDAQ:BTM) announced a 1-for-7 reverse stock split effective Monday, February 23rd, with share adjustments occurring after the market close on Friday, February 20th. The company, which operates a large network of cryptocurrency kiosks, has a market capitalization of $69.22 million and a P/E of 4.13. Analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating on the stock with a target price of $5.83, despite recent downgrades from some firms.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Michael Gallagher Sells Shares of Camden Property Trust
feed.summary: Michael Gallagher, the Chief Accounting Officer of Camden Property Trust (CPT), sold 169 shares of the company on February 18, 2026. This transaction leaves him with 39,640 shares. The stock is currently trading at $108.43, and with a GF Value of $112.07, it is considered fairly valued.

feed.title: GLPI Q4 Results: Revenue and FFO Beat Analyst Estimates | 2025 Report - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Gaming and Leisure Properties Inc. announced strong fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst expectations for both funds from operations (FFO) and revenue. The real estate investment trust reported FFO of $290 million, or 99 cents per share, against an average estimate of 98 cents. Revenue reached $407 million, exceeding analyst forecasts of $405.1 million, with the company also providing positive FFO guidance for the coming year.

feed.title: How Larger Transactions Are Shaping M&A and Equity Trends
feed.summary: The article highlights that larger transactions were key to the M&A and equity market recovery in 2025, particularly in the fourth quarter. While the number of global equity transactions and M&A announcements decreased quarter over quarter, their total value increased, driven by significant deals, especially in the healthcare sector in the US. Although 2025's total transaction values for equity issuance and M&A grew year over year, equity issuance remained less than half of its 2021 peak, whereas M&A values were much closer to 2021 levels.

feed.title: Australia On Verge Of Winter Cruise Boom
feed.summary: Australia is poised for a winter cruise boom, as its mild climate and warm states are becoming increasingly attractive to cruise lines looking to deploy their expanding fleets during the northern hemisphere's off-season. Royal Caribbean Group is considering year-round sailings, and Regent Seven Seas will offer a three-month ultra-luxury winter season in 2027, indicating a significant shift from traditional seasonal cruising. This expansion promises substantial economic benefits for Australia, contingent on collaborative efforts between industry and government to address regulatory and infrastructure challenges.

feed.title: Samsung verifies 6G candidate-band antenna technology with KT, Keysight
feed.summary: Samsung Electronics, in collaboration with Korean telecom operator KT Corp. and U.S. electronics test equipment firm Keysight Technologies Inc., has successfully verified ultra-high-density antenna technology for future 6G networks. Through outdoor field tests, they achieved a peak downlink data rate of up to 3 gigabits per second (Gbps) in the 7 gigahertz (GHz) band using Xtreme multiple-input multiple-output (X-MIMO) technology. This development is expected to support 6G communication advancements, particularly in data-intensive sectors like artificial intelligence and extended reality.

feed.title: Michael Gallagher Sells 169 Shares of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) Stock
feed.summary: Michael Gallagher, CAO of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT), sold 169 shares of the company's stock on February 18th for a total of $18,324.67. This transaction reduced his stake by 0.42% to 39,640 shares. The sale follows Camden Property Trust's recent earnings report where it missed EPS estimates but announced a $600 million stock buyback program and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages Apollo Global Management, Inc. Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation – APO
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) following allegations that top executives consulted Jeffrey Epstein on the firm’s tax affairs, despite previous denials. This news led to a drop in Apollo's stock price, and the firm is now preparing a class action lawsuit to recover investor losses. Investors who purchased Apollo securities are encouraged to contact the Rosen Law Firm to inquire about joining the prospective class action.

feed.title: Buford Ortale Acquires 2,000 Shares of Franklin BSP Realty Trust (NYSE:FBRT) Stock
feed.summary: Director Buford Ortale recently acquired 2,000 shares of Franklin BSP Realty Trust (FBRT) stock, increasing his direct ownership to 49,851 shares. The company has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $13.50, despite an unsustainably high dividend payout ratio of 221.88%. Institutional investors have also been adjusting their stakes in FBRT.

feed.title: John Alexander Kelly Sells 8,149 Shares of Precision BioSciences (NASDAQ:DTIL) Stock
feed.summary: Precision BioSciences CFO John Alexander Kelly sold 8,149 shares of the company's stock on February 18th for $3.84 per share, totaling $31,292. This transaction reduced his direct holdings by 6.08% to 125,883 shares. The article also notes significant institutional investment in Q4, mixed analyst ratings, and the company's current stock performance.

feed.title: Precision BioSciences (NASDAQ:DTIL) Insider Sells $18,912.00 in Stock
feed.summary: J. Jefferson Smith, an insider at Precision BioSciences (NASDAQ:DTIL), sold 4,925 shares of the company's stock for $18,912.00 on February 18th, reducing his stake by 3.88%. This sale follows another transaction on January 21st where he sold 10,200 shares. The stock traded up $0.07 to $3.92, with analysts holding a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $60.00.

feed.title: Class Action Lawsuit Filed Against PayPal Holdings, Inc.
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm has filed a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal provided overly optimistic financial targets while concealing inadequacies in its salesforce, which misled investors and caused financial losses. The law firm operates on a contingency fee basis, inviting affected investors to apply as lead plaintiffs by April 20, 2026.

feed.title: Precision BioSciences (NASDAQ:DTIL) CEO Sells 20,559 Shares
feed.summary: Precision BioSciences CEO Michael Amoroso sold 20,559 shares of DTIL stock on February 18th for $78,946.56, reducing his stake by 7.79%. This sale, combined with a previous sale in January, totals 55,358 shares for approximately $224,058 in proceeds. The company's stock currently trades at $3.92, with analysts generally rating it as "Hold" and having a consensus price target of $60.00.

feed.title: Pool construction underway at Luxor on Las Vegas Strip
feed.summary: Luxor hotel-casino on the Las Vegas Strip is undergoing a pool renovation, with crews demolishing the south pool to construct a new area with more deck space. MGM Resorts International did not provide a timeline or cost, but assured guests will have access to at least one pool during the remodel. This project is occurring during the colder months, in anticipation of warmer temperatures and pool season.

feed.title: Popular soda flavor returns as Keurig Dr Pepper rolls out 35 new drinks
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper is significantly expanding its beverage portfolio with over 35 new drinks across various brands, including carbonated soft drinks, teas, waters, juices, and energy drinks. Notably, the popular Dr Pepper Creamy Coconut flavor is returning to shelves due to consumer demand, alongside other new and returning flavors like A&W Root Beer Float and 7UP Shirley Temple. The company is focusing on evolving consumer preferences, such as the demand for zero-sugar options and innovative flavors.

feed.title: Ecolab Declares Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Ecolab Inc.'s board of directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per common share. The dividend will be paid on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 17, 2026. Ecolab has a history of paying cash dividends on its common stock for 89 consecutive years.

feed.title: Archer Daniels Midland (NYSE:ADM) SVP Jennifer Weber Sells 25,000 Shares
feed.summary: Archer Daniels Midland SVP Jennifer Weber sold 25,000 shares of ADM stock for $1.676 million, reducing her stake by 16.82%. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.52 and reported mixed quarterly results with EPS beating estimates but revenue missing. Analysts currently have a "Reduce" rating on ADM with an average target price of $58.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Bradley Gabosch Sells Shares of Old Dominion Freig
feed.summary: Bradley Gabosch, a Director at Old Dominion Freight Line Inc (ODFL), sold 3,134 shares of the company on February 18, 2026. Following this transaction, he now holds 11,278 shares. The company's stock was trading at $194.27 on the day of the sale, and GuruFocus assessed it as "Modestly Overvalued" with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.11.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) EVP Sells $1,200,000.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Phillips 66 EVP Don Baldridge sold 7,500 shares of company stock for $1.2 million on February 17th, reducing his stake by 16.31%. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.27 per share, yielding approximately 3.3%. Phillips 66 reported Q4 EPS of $2.47, beating estimates, and analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $158.72.

feed.title: AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.73
feed.summary: AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.73 per share, payable on May 15th to shareholders of record on April 15th, representing a 3.1% yield. The company has a history of raising its dividend annually for 53 consecutive years and maintains a payout ratio of 49.5%. AbbVie recently beat quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and provided positive FY2026 guidance, though the stock saw a slight dip.

feed.title: Jack In The Box (JACK) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
feed.summary: Jack In The Box (JACK) reported Q1 2026 revenue of $349.52 million, a 25.6% year-over-year decrease and EPS of $1.00, down from $1.92 a year ago. While revenue beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.64%, EPS missed by 8.81%. The article also details various key metrics, including restaurant counts and same-store sales, comparing them against analyst estimates.

feed.title: Micron & 2 More Profitable Stocks to Buy Now for Big Gains
feed.summary: This article identifies Micron Technology (MU), Ralph Lauren Corporation (RL), and Modine Manufacturing Company (MOD) as top profitable stock picks. These companies were selected based on their high net income ratios and strong upside potential, along with meeting specific screening parameters including a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) and higher-than-industry sales and net income growth. The analysis emphasizes the importance of the net income ratio as a key indicator of a company's financial health and its ability to manage expenses effectively.

feed.title: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.30
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, payable on March 26th to shareholders of record on March 12th, representing a 3.6% yield and a sustainable payout ratio of 31.3%. The company reported mixed Q4 2025 results, with revenue beating estimates but EPS missing due to near-term restructuring costs. Despite a slightly conservative FY2026 guidance, LKQ has a strong cash flow and has initiated a strategic review to unlock shareholder value.

feed.title: Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM) to Issue $0.89 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.885 per share, payable on April 24th to shareholders of record on March 27th, representing a 1.9% yield. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 24.1% and analysts projecting a future payout ratio of around 27%. The company recently beat earnings expectations with an EPS of ($3.96) and revenue of $32.64 billion, and has set FY2026 guidance at $9.00 EPS.

feed.title: Evergy Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.70
feed.summary: Evergy Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.695 per share, payable on March 20th to shareholders of record on March 10th. This represents a 3.5% dividend yield, and the company has consistently increased its dividend for 20 consecutive years. Analysts expect Evergy to continue covering its dividend with a future payout ratio of around 69%.

feed.title: Insider Selling: The Ensign Group (NASDAQ:ENSG) Director Sells 1,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: The Ensign Group (NASDAQ:ENSG) Director Daren Shaw sold 1,000 shares of the company's stock for $213,430, reducing his stake by 4.04%. The company recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating EPS estimates and showing significant revenue growth, and has also increased its quarterly dividend. Analysts largely recommend a "Buy" rating for ENSG, and institutional investors hold a substantial portion of the stock.

feed.title: First Capital Schedules Upcoming 2026 Annual Stockholders Meeting
feed.summary: First Capital, Inc. (FCAP) has announced that its annual stockholders meeting will take place on May 18, 2026, following the announcement on February 19, 2026. The regional banking holding company, which operates First Harrison Bank, was recently rated a Buy with a $56.00 price target by an analyst, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, also gave FCAP an "Outperform" score due to its solid financial health.

feed.title: AGNC Investment Stock Is Interesting, but Here's What I'd Buy Instead
feed.summary: This article contrasts AGNC Investment (AGNC) with Realty Income (O) for investors seeking reliable dividends. While AGNC offers a high yield, its dividend history is volatile and declining, making it less suitable for income-focused investors. Realty Income, despite a lower yield, provides a much more stable and growing dividend, making it a better choice for consistent passive income.

feed.title: Targa Resources Corp. Announces Form 10-K Available
feed.summary: Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) has publicly announced the filing of its Form 10-K with the SEC for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. This report is accessible on the SEC's website and the company's investor relations section. Targa Resources Corp. is highlighted as a leading provider of midstream services and a significant independent infrastructure company in North America, with its operations supporting the delivery of energy across the United States and internationally.

feed.title: Expeditors International Appoints Roberto Martinez President, Global Products
feed.summary: Expeditors International (EXPD) has appointed Roberto A. Martinez as President, Global Products, effective June 1, 2025. His employment agreement includes an annual base salary of $100,000, eligibility for incentive-based compensation, severance benefits, and post-employment non-compete and non-solicitation clauses. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates EXPD as Outperform, citing strong financial performance and positive corporate events, despite a high P/E ratio.

feed.title: Gentex (NASDAQ:GNTX) CTO Sells 11,248 Shares
feed.summary: Gentex (NASDAQ:GNTX) CTO Neil Boehm sold 11,248 shares of company stock on February 17th at an average price of $24.82, totaling $279,175.36. This transaction reduced his stake by 16.02% to 58,951 shares. The company recently reported earnings per share of $0.43, in line with estimates, and revenue of $644.4 million, slightly below expectations, while maintaining a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $26.71.

feed.title: Kevin Nash Sells 11,885 Shares of Gentex (NASDAQ:GNTX) Stock
feed.summary: Gentex CFO Kevin Nash sold 11,885 shares of the company's stock for approximately $296,887 on February 17th, reducing his direct ownership by 16.67%. Following the sale, Nash now directly owns 59,430 shares valued at about $1.48 million. The transaction occurred as Gentex shares traded down approximately 2.3%, with analysts giving the stock a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $26.71.

feed.title: BigBear.ai (NYSE:BBAI) Shares Up 2.6% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: BigBear.ai (NYSE:BBAI) shares increased by 2.6% to $4.1950 on Thursday, with trading volume about half its average. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with downgrades from Wall Street Zen and Cantor Fitzgerald, but a buy rating from HC Wainwright. The company shows strong liquidity with quick and current ratios of 3.13 and low leverage (debt/equity 0.18), though it has a negative P/E ratio of -2.95.

feed.title: Seagate Tech Executes Private Exchange to Retire Debt
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (STX) recently completed private exchanges of $600 million in 3.50% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2028, using cash and approximately 5.95 million ordinary shares. This transaction retired a significant portion of its debt, leaving $400 million outstanding, and strategically adjusted its capital structure. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates STX as Outperform due to improving fundamentals and a positive earnings outlook, despite some balance sheet risks and a relatively high valuation.

feed.title: Constellation Selected as Preferred Energy Source of New Nissan Stadium and the Tennessee Titans
feed.summary: Constellation has been chosen as the Preferred Energy Source for the new Nissan Stadium and the Tennessee Titans through a 20-year agreement. Starting in 2027, Constellation will operate an on-site energy plant, providing heating and cooling for the stadium, designed for high reliability, energy efficiency, and fan comfort. This partnership emphasizes the Titans' commitment to sustainability and builds on Constellation's existing presence in Nashville through its operation of the Metro Nashville's District Energy System.

feed.title: Constellation Completes Calpine Transaction, Powering America's Clean Energy Future
feed.summary: Constellation (Nasdaq: CEG) has announced the completion of its acquisition of Calpine Corporation from Energy Capital Partners, forming the nation's largest electricity producer. This combination of Constellation's nuclear fleet with Calpine's natural gas and geothermal generation aims to provide reliable, clean energy, supporting America's clean energy future and economic leadership. The expanded company will serve 2.5 million customers and operate 55 gigawatts of capacity, driving innovation in new clean technologies.

feed.title: Forum Energy Technologies Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results and Outlook; Repurchased 11% of Shares Outstanding in 2025
feed.summary: Forum Energy Technologies (FET) announced its Q4 and full-year 2025 results, reporting $202 million in revenue and $2 million in net income for Q4, and $891 million in orders for the full year with a 113% book-to-bill ratio. The company repurchased 11% of its shares outstanding in 2025 and provided full-year 2026 guidance including revenue of $800-$880 million and a 16% increase in adjusted EBITDA, driven by a strong backlog and market share gains.

feed.title: DuPont Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.20
feed.summary: DuPont's Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026. This decision reflects the company's strong cash flow and commitment to shareholder returns. DuPont, a global innovation leader, operates in key markets such as healthcare, water, construction, and industrial sectors, and encourages investors to access further information via its Investor Relations website.

feed.title: F&G Annuities & Life Inc (NYSE:FG) Reports Q4 2025 Revenue Beat but Misses on Earnings
feed.summary: F&G Annuities & Life Inc (NYSE:FG) reported mixed financial results for Q4 2025, with revenues of $1.77 billion significantly beating analyst estimates, but adjusted earnings per share of $0.91 falling short of expectations. The market reacted negatively to the EPS miss despite strong sales growth, indicating investor focus on profitability in the financial services sector. Analysts anticipate continued sales growth and improved profitability for F&G in 2026.

feed.title: Fiesta Texas owner takes billion-dollar hit
feed.summary: Six Flags, owner of Fiesta Texas, has taken a significant financial hit, with its San Antonio theme park expected to play a crucial role in its turnaround strategy. The company's Texas regional general manager, Jeffrey Siebert, based in San Antonio, is also identified as a key figure in these recovery efforts.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage forecasts annual FFO below estimates on tepid demand
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage (EXR) has forecast its annual Funds From Operations (FFO) to be below market estimates. This projection is attributed to a tepid demand for its storage services. The news was reported by Refinitiv and Reuters.

feed.title: CTO Realty Growth (CTO) Exceeds Q4 Expectations with Strong Revenue
feed.summary: CTO Realty Growth (CTO) reported a strong fourth quarter, with FFO of $0.49 per share and revenue of $38.34 million, both exceeding analyst expectations. The company projects Core FFO per Common Share for 2026 to be between $1.98 and $2.03. While demonstrating solid revenue growth and strong liquidity, CTO faces challenges with a negative net margin and significant leverage, alongside sector-specific risks.

feed.title: Jefferies Maintains Buy on UAL (United Airlines Holdings, Inc.) Feb 2026
feed.summary: Jefferies has maintained a "Buy" rating for United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (UAL) but reduced its price target from $154 to $148 as of February 19, 2026. This adjustment reflects updated company or market assumptions, signaling continued bullishness but with a slightly lowered expectation for upside. Investors are advised to consider this maintained rating and revised target alongside other financial indicators and market trends.

feed.title: EMPLOYERS HOLDINGS INC (NYSE:EIG) Reports Q4 Earnings Beat Amid Revenue Miss and Claims Challenges
feed.summary: Employers Holdings Inc (NYSE:EIG) reported a mixed financial picture for Q4 2025, beating earnings estimates with $0.66 per share adjusted net income, but missing revenue expectations by reporting $170.5 million against an estimated $218.7 million. The company faced challenges with a higher combined ratio due to increased California Cumulative Trauma claims but highlighted strong investment income and aggressive capital return to shareholders. Management is taking strategic actions to return to historical profitability, including targeted pricing and the launch of a new excess workers' compensation product.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp Stock After Earnings: Undervalued Bank or Value Trap?
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) recently released earnings, showing it is navigating deposit pricing pressure and cooling rate-cut hopes. The company's net interest income has plateaued, but fee-based businesses are providing a buffer, and credit quality, while normalizing, remains manageable. Despite potential regulatory capital increases, USB's dividend appears secure, positioning it as a quality, income-oriented regional bank with moderate upside for long-term investors.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials Keeps Quarterly Dividend of $0.83 per Share, Payable March 31 to Holders of Record March 2
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend of $0.83 per share. This dividend is payable on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026. The company, a major producer of construction materials, also released information regarding recent analyst price target adjustments and an executive appointment.

feed.title: Five9 Q4 2025 Earnings: Revenue and Profit Top Analyst Expectations - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Five9 (FIVN) reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, surpassing analyst expectations for both revenue and profit. The cloud contact center software provider achieved $300.3 million in revenue, a 7.8% year-over-year increase, and adjusted earnings per share of $0.80. While the company's five-year sales growth rate is robust, recent quarters indicate a deceleration, with future revenue growth projected to slow further.
